name: circle-of-competence
description: Evaluations for circle-of-competence skill trigger accuracy

evals.name: trigger-positive-explicit
evals.description: Skill should trigger when user needs to clarify what they know vs don't know

prompts.input: 能力圈分析：这个话题我真的懂吗？还是超出了我的专业范围？
prompts.reason: Explicit Chinese trigger '能力圈' (circle of competence) + expertise boundary

prompts.input: Before I give advice on this, let me assess my circle of competence
prompts.reason: Explicit English trigger 'circle of competence' + self-assessment

prompts.input: 我真的懂区块链吗？还是我在能力圈外说话？
prompts.reason: Chinese trigger '我真的懂吗' (do I actually know) + overconfidence check

prompts.input: Know your limits: am I qualified to make this decision or should I delegate?
这个领域我有 10 年经验，那个领域我完全不懂——怎样区分？
prompts.reason: Chinese context: core competence vs blind spots identification

evals.name: trigger-negative-general
evals.description: Skill should NOT trigger for learning new skills, analyzing specific problems, or quick decisions

prompts.input: How do I learn Kubernetes? What resources should I use?
prompts.reason: Learning request; should trigger feynman-technique to expand circle, not assess boundaries

prompts.input: Fast decision needed on this technical issue
prompts.reason: Time pressure; should trigger OODA-loop or pragmatic problem-solving

prompts.input: Why is this system slow? Help me debug
prompts.reason: Concrete problem-solving, not competence boundary assessment
